description: Flip Opportunity in Dallas just North of 635, Richardson ISD! Great location, this property is a brick 3/2 on one of the largest lots in the area with a garage conversion (456 sqft). There are comps to suggest converting this back or leave as is for the additional sqft. You can expect near full rehab, sellers are in the process of moving everything out, currently occupied. Access on July 23rd @ 12pm. Contact Ariel for questions 8175659399.
